title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston... screen Cancel button
scenario: Verify that canceling a DFU update after turning off the headset at ~10% progress returns the user to the home screen of the connected device.
steps: Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
Tap Update, then Continue, then Start Update.
Turn off the headset at approximately 10% progress to trigger a DFU failure.
Tap Cancel on the Houston screen.
expected: User is directed back to the home screen for the currently connected device.
